title: Freedom of expression survey
body: "The Commission for Countering Extremism (CCE) commissioned Ipsos UK in January 2025 to conduct a nationally representative survey to examine public perceptions and experiences of freedom of expression in England and Wales.  Building on prior research by Ipsos and Kings College London, this study:   explores attitudes towards free speech across various social, political and religious topics examines differences in attitudes across demographic groups explores reasons why individuals might refrain from expressing their views    We are aware that this publication may have accessibility issues. We are reviewing it so that we can fix these.  Read more about our accessible documents policy.  "
